description:
This multiple-choice quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency in modern CSS, challenging them to prove their skills are resume-worthy. While framed with a playful, slightly sarcastic tone that downplays the difficulty, the assessment actually tests nuanced knowledge of contemporary styling techniques. It serves as a quick but rigorous benchmark for front-end developers aiming to validate their expertise.
Topics: Modern CSS, CSS best practices, Front-end styling techniques
Audience: Front-end developers and web programmers seeking to validate or showcase their CSS expertise
